generated_oml:
instance EnrichedBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Modeling (BIM) representing Building Control System (BCS) components including sensors, actuators, and controllers, establishing a unified semantic foundation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMStandards
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data connectivity."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin state management."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationOptimizationService, DecisionMakingSupportService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine for high-fidelity interactive visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationOptimizationService, DecisionMakingSupportService
]

instance BIMStandards : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for structured asset representation."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationOptimizationService, DecisionMakingSupportService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring through data-driven insights for building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides predictive analytics for forecasting building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance SimulationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides simulation and optimization capabilities for infrastructure management."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOptimizationInsight
]

instance DecisionMakingSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides enhanced decision-making support to stakeholders in the AECO domain for building lifecycle management."
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insights for building operations."
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights for forecasting building operations."
]

instance SimulationOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation and optimization insights for infrastructure management."
]

instance DecisionMakingSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Decision-making support insights for building lifecycle management."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system implements a model-driven deployment framework with a layered system architecture (Section II) and standardized extension points (Abstract) for managing component integration, resource allocation, and system-wide coordination across heterogeneous infrastructure environments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises four primary stages: (1) Device modeling within BIM environment by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to address BIM's static representation limitations; (2) Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention; (3) Runtime operations involving real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital counterparts, coupled with interactive visualization for Facility Manager monitoring and control; (4) Evolution through modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics for adaptive operational requirements. Governance is role-based, with distinct responsibilities assigned to Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers across lifecycle phases."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Building Information Modeling (BIM) compatibility, Unreal Engine visualization, and adherence to standardized interoperability protocols specified in Section III."
]
